level_signals: 10+ years of experience in program management, sales operations, process improvement, management consulting or competitive intelligence
8+ years of experience building or supporting GTM programs, processes, or workflows
Track record of delivering global transformational, complex programs

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in program management, sales operations, process improvement, management consulting or competitive intelligence
8+ years of experience building or supporting GTM programs, processes, or workflows
A strong track record of delivering global transformational, complex programs in a changing, ambiguous environment which have delivered quantifiable business impact
Experience working with B2B sales teams; preferably in technology, infrastructure, or platform companies
Excellent analytical, presentation, and communication experience, influencing across all levels. You set a high-bar in terms of communication effectiveness.
Ability to influence cross functional stakeholders to align and executive on common objectives.

scope.surface: Market Intelligence function within Product Marketing; competitive program spanning GTM, Product, and Sales Ops
primary_metrics_inferred: Quantifiable business impact from competitive intelligence initiatives
core_responsibilities: Work cross-functionally to shape the program to meet internal user needs and design an engagement framework that maps touchpoints and use-cases between cross-functional partners and Market Intelligence
Execute on the technology roadmap for Market Intelligence by working across Internal Systems, Data Science, and Sales Ops to automate reporting, KPIs, and insights
Drive competitive GTM execution by triaging deals-in-flight, bringing in the right cross-functional stakeholders, and developing a treatment plan for Stripe to win
Contribute to product decision-making and roadmap prioritization by partnering with product operations and product management

green_flags: Clear program ownership described — design, management, and execution of a competitive program
High cross-functional visibility across GTM, Product, Sales Ops, Engineering, and Data Science
Role sits within Product Marketing with direct influence on product strategy and GTM
Stripe is a well-known, high-growth fintech company with global scale
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — candidates cannot assess work arrangement requirements
